ecarx.carext.interaction.charging

Interface ICharging

  • All Superinterfaces:
    BaseAPI

    public interface ICharging
extends BaseAPI
    This class provides the API for manager charging functionality.
    Since:
    7

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static interface  ICharging.IChargingConfigListener
      Charging config listener.
      static interface  ICharging.ScheduleChargingMode

        BaseAPI.Callback

      schedule charging cyclicity
      static int SCHEDULE_CHARGING_MODE_OFF
      schedule charging off
      static int SCHEDULE_CHARGING_MODE_SINGLE
      schedule charging only single

      All Methods Instance Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      default boolean getChargingConfigSaveStatus()
      Get the charging config save Status.
      default int getScheduleChargingMode()
      Get the scheduled charging mode.

      Get the plug in charging switch status.

      Set the scheduled charging Mode.

      Set the schedule charging time.

    • Method Detail

      • setScheduleChargingMode

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_CHARGING_CONFIG")
default boolean setScheduleChargingMode(@ICharging.ScheduleChargingMode
                                                                                                                     int mode)
        Set the scheduled charging Mode.
        Parameters:
        mode - ICharging.ScheduleChargingMode.
        Returns:
        true - set success, false - set failed.
        Since:
        7

      • getScheduleChargingMode

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_CHARGING_CONFIG")
 @ICharging.ScheduleChargingMode
default int getScheduleChargingMode()
        Get the scheduled charging mode.
        Returns:
        ICharging.ScheduleChargingMode.
        Since:
        7

      • setScheduleChargingTime

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_CHARGING_CONFIG")
default boolean setScheduleChargingTime(@NonNull
                                                                                                                     java.util.Calendar[] times)
        Set the schedule charging time.
        Parameters:
        times - if time is just one, use Calendar[0]. if time are two, use Calendar[0] indicates start time, Calendar[1] indicates end time.
        Returns:
        true - set success, false - set failed.
        Since:
        7

      • getScheduleChargingTime

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_CHARGING_CONFIG")
 @NonNull
default java.util.Calendar[] getScheduleChargingTime()
        Get the schedule charging time.
        Returns:
        Calendar[] if time is just one, use Calendar[0]. if time are two, use Calendar[0] indicates start time, Calendar[1] indicates end time.
        Since:
        7

      • setPriorityFullyCharged

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_CHARGING_CONFIG")
default boolean setPriorityFullyCharged(boolean status)
        Set the priority full charged status.
        Parameters:
        status - true - on, false = off.
        Returns:
        true - set success, false - set failed.
        Since:
        7

      • isPriorityFullyCharged

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_CHARGING_CONFIG")
default boolean isPriorityFullyCharged()
        Get the priority full charged status.
        Returns:
        true - on, false - off.
        Since:
        7

      • setPlugInCharging

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_CHARGING_CONFIG")
default boolean setPlugInCharging(boolean status)
        Set the plug in charging switch status.
        Parameters:
        status - true - on, false = off.
        Returns:
        true - set success, false - set failed.
        Since:
        7

      • isPlugInCharging

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_CHARGING_CONFIG")
default boolean isPlugInCharging()
        Get the plug in charging switch status.
        Returns:
        true - on, false - off.
        Since:
        7

      • saveChargingConfig

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_CHARGING_CONFIG")
default boolean saveChargingConfig()
        Save the charging config Status.
        Returns:
        true - set success, false - set failed.
        Since:
        7

      • getChargingConfigSaveStatus

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_CHARGING_CONFIG")
default boolean getChargingConfigSaveStatus()
        Get the charging config save Status.
        Returns:
        true - success, false - failed.
        Since:
        7

      • isSupportChargingConfig

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_CHARGING_CONFIG")
 @NonNull
default FunctionStatus isSupportChargingConfig()
        Check charging function is supported or not.
        Returns:
        FunctionStatus.AVAILABLE indicates the call type is supported and can be dialed by APP side(Applications). FunctionStatus.UNAVAILABLE indicates the call type is supported and can not be dialed by APP side(Applications). FunctionStatus.ERROR indicates the call type is something error.
        Since:
        7

      • registerChargingConfigListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_CHARGING_CONFIG")
default void registerChargingConfigListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                                         ICharging.IChargingConfigListener listener)
        Register charging config status listener, if anything changes will callback to ICharging.IChargingConfigListener.
        Since:
        7

      • unregisterChargingConfigListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_CHARGING_CONFIG")
default void unregisterChargingConfigListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                                           ICharging.IChargingConfigListener listener)
        Unregister charging config status listener.
        Parameters:
        listener - before the registered listener.
        Since:
        7
